name: Agro Capital Management Corp.
summary: Agro Capital Management Corp. does not have significant operations. Previously, the company was engaged in online tourist guide business. It intends to enter into a merger, acquisition, or other business venture transaction with companies operating in the aqua-culture development industry in Malaysia. The company was formerly known as Guate Tourism Inc. and changed its name to Agro Capital Management Corp. in December 2015. Agro Capital Management Corp. was founded in 2013 and is based in New York, New York.
